payload.answer: Acknowledged. The proposal to store the entire 8000-word transcript as a single conversation_summary card is recorded with ambiguity preserved. A plan to optionally segment the transcript into smaller, linked memory cards is noted for durability and retrieval flexibility.
payload.decision: preserve_all_claims_with_ambiguous_state; do not consolidate into a single definitive fact; create memory cards that reflect discourse segments and unresolved items; ensure durability by anchoring statements to entity and relation structures with clear provenance.

entity_resolution.reason: No concrete persistent entities extracted yet; placeholders created to preserve ambiguity and allow later resolution.

memory_cards.statement: A proposal was made to store an entire 8000-word transcript as a single conversation_summary card.
Storing an entire 8000-word transcript as a single card may hinder retrieval granularity; the system should consider splitting into meaningful fragments while preserving linkages.

details: Stored initial memory entry for conversation_summary proposal.
Ambiguity preserved; no definitive factual consolidation performed.

repair_options: Segment the transcript into thematically coherent chunks (e.g., by topic, speaker, or section) and link them via a parent card.
Attach provenance metadata (source, timestamp, author) to each memory card.
Preserve original verbatim text for each segment and store an index mapping segments to the full transcript.
Create placeholders for unresolved references to entities or statements that require disambiguation.
Maintain a changelog for any future supersession or deletion, marking superseded cards as deprecated rather than erased.
